query_used:
SELECT * FROM composition_instances
WHERE notes ILIKE '%CONCENTRATE%'
ORDER BY instance_id
LIMIT 20

rows.notes: Near-field Scanning (NSOM): Localize the interaction to a sub-wavelength aperture/tip to bypass far-field diffraction. | DAMAGE_OP: CONCENTRATE | ANALOG: local_probing | SOURCE: gemini_batch_4

Algebraic Closure: Concentrating all possible missing roots into a single unconditionally complete limit space (e.g., algebraic closure of Q). | DAMAGE_OP: CONCENTRATE | ANALOG: wolf_interval | SOURCE: gemini_batch_13
Hard-core Predicates: Concentrate the inherent hardness of a function into a single bit. | DAMAGE_OP: CONCENTRATE | ANALOG: wolf_interval | SOURCE: gemini_batch_2

Superdirective Antenna: Concentrating the gain in an extremely small physical aperture at the cost of near-infinite Q-factor and zero bandwidth. | DAMAGE_OP: CONCENTRATE | ANALOG: wolf_interval | SOURCE: gemini_batch_7
Spontaneous symmetry breaking: SYMMETRIZE then BREAK_SYMMETRY on this hub. | COMPOSITION: SYMMETRIZE → BREAK_SYMMETRY | DAMAGE_PAIR: DISTRIBUTE → CONCENTRATE | SOURCE: composition_depth2
Spectral concentration: DUALIZE then BREAK_SYMMETRY on this hub. | COMPOSITION: DUALIZE → BREAK_SYMMETRY | DAMAGE_PAIR: HIERARCHIZE → CONCENTRATE | SOURCE: composition_depth2
